titleStmt.title: SII 25.120: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 120. (A.R. No. 120 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the inscription viz., year 46, Mithuna 21, śu 12, Sunday, Anurādhā regularly correspond to 1342 A.D., June 16.

This inscription records the declaration made by the administrative officials of the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, to the effect that Periyanāyaṉ alias Viśālayadēva, the avaiyaṉ of Śūraikkuḍi in Tēnāṟṟuppōkku in Adaḷaiyūrnāḍu would be entitled to receive certain amount of corn for each mā of the temple land as tiruvāśal-pāḍikāval and the privileges. This was given in order to show their gratitude to the recipient for his act of renovation of the temple and the reconsecration of the deity consequent upon the disturbance made by the Muhammadans during the time of their occupation. The temple officials seem to have decided to confer the parivaṭṭam on Viśālayadēva but latter preferred to give it to the common people of the village which was accepted too.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 6vatu midhuna
nāyaṟṟu 2 10 1 Um pūṟuva pakkattu tuvāteciyum Ādityavāramum peṟṟa Aniḻattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷa nāṭ
ṭu brahmadeyan=tiruppattūr Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār koyil śrī rudraśrī māheśvaraśrī kāriyañ cey
vārkaḷum tevakaṉmiyum Ataḷaiyūr nāṭṭut teṉāṟṟup pokku cūraikkuṭi Avaiyaṉ periya nāyaṉāṉ vicālaya tevar
kku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu tulukkar kālamāy tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyanār koyilile pāḷayamāka tulukkar Iruntu tirumeni
calaṉaṅkaḷuṇṭākaiyil jīrṇoddhārapratiṣṭhai Ivar Ēṟiyaruḷap paṇṇukaiyāl Ivar tiruvācal kāvalāka Ivarkkuk kuṭutta cuvātantiriyaṅkaḷāvatu
nāyanār tirumuṉpe Oṭukkum parivaṭṭamum taṉ makattāvāṉa periya nāyaṉ vicālaya tevarkku Eṉṟu vaḻaṅkuvatāka kuṭukka Ivar tām piṟanta Ūri
ṉ perāle vaḻaṅkaveṇṭumeṉkaiyāl Oṭukkum parivaṭṭam cūlaikkuṭiyūrāṟ keṉṟu nātoṟum muṟpāṭu vaḻaṅkuvatākavum te
Digital edition of SII 25.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
